syntax_4429.creator: BluBoy3ch0

[0-2, 0 being deflated, 2 being inflated]

[0-2, 0 being deflated, 2 being inflated]

syntax_4435.creator: BluBoy3ch0
syntax_4435.title: Cannot Enter Ticks
syntax_4435.description: Gets the number of ticks that an entity has to wait before returning to their Beehive if the entity is a Bee
syntax_4435.syntax_pattern:
[the] cannot enter ticks of %livingentities% 
%livingentities%'[s] cannot enter ticks

en: Gets the number of ticks that an entity has to wait before returning to their Beehive if the entity is a Bee

syntax_4437.creator: BluBoy3ch0
syntax_4437.title: Box Color
syntax_4437.description:
Gets the color of a Shulker Box Block

<Added this because "color of block" where the block was a shulker box was not working for me, if that works for you in vanilla, great. If not, you can use this>

en:
Gets the color of a Shulker Box Block

<Added this because "color of block" where the block was a shulker box was not working for me, if that works for you in vanilla, great. If not, you can use this>

syntax_4455.creator: BluBoy3ch0
syntax_4455.title: Is Shivering
syntax_4455.description: Checks whether or not an entity is shivering, meaning they are a Strider and are not in a "warm" environment

en: Checks whether or not an entity is shivering, meaning they are a Strider and are not in a "warm" environment

syntax_4456.creator: BluBoy3ch0
syntax_4456.title: Entities in Range
syntax_4456.description: Gets the entities that are in range, meaning they acquire the effects of a Beacon. These values are only Players as only players are affected by a Beacon.
syntax_4456.syntax_pattern:
entit(ys|ies) in range of %blocks%
%blocks%'[s] entit(ys|ies) in range

en: Gets the entities that are in range, meaning they acquire the effects of a Beacon. These values are only Players as only players are affected by a Beacon.

syntax_4458.creator: BluBoy3ch0
syntax_4458.title: Is Awake
syntax_4458.description: Checks whether an entity is awake, that entity is a Bat.

en: Checks whether an entity is awake, that entity is a Bat.

syntax_4457.creator: BluBoy3ch0
syntax_4457.title: Stung State
syntax_4457.description: Gets the Has Stung value of a Bee, this will return a boolean (yes/no) dependant on if they have or have not stung before. Refer to the Has Stung syntax

en: Gets the Has Stung value of a Bee, this will return a boolean (yes/no) dependant on if they have or have not stung before. Refer to the Has Stung syntax
Makes a new team

syntax_4461.creator: BluBoy3ch0
syntax_4461.title: Bat Toggle Sleep
syntax_4461.description:
Called when a bat attempts to sleep or wake up from its slumber.
If a Bat Toggle Sleep event is cancelled, the Bat will not toggle its sleep state.

en:
Called when a bat attempts to sleep or wake up from its slumber.
If a Bat Toggle Sleep event is cancelled, the Bat will not toggle its sleep state.

syntax_4462.creator: BluBoy3ch0
syntax_4462.title: Lectern Take
syntax_4462.description: This event is called when a player clicks the button to take a book of a Lectern. If this event is cancelled the book remains on the lectern.

en: This event is called when a player clicks the button to take a book of a Lectern. If this event is cancelled the book remains on the lectern.

syntax_4460.creator: BluBoy3ch0

en: Called when the moisture level of a soil block changes.

Gets whether this snowman is in "derp mode", meaning it is not wearing a pumpkin.

syntax_4468.creator: BluBoy3ch0
syntax_4468.title: Object Type
syntax_4468.description: Gets the type of an object, an object being a variable or something else. If the variable/object is a String, it will return "String", and so on.

en: Gets the type of an object, an object being a variable or something else. If the variable/object is a String, it will return "String", and so on.

syntax_4494.description: Gets the size of a team, which is how many entries a team has.

syntax_4479.title: Not Boolean
syntax_4479.description: This expression returns the opposite value of a boolean, useful for toggling true/false values.

syntax_4660.description: Gets the ambient spawn rate, in ticks, of the server.

syntax_4655.description: Provides the value of the Is Force Loaded condition, can be set to a boolean (yes/no).

syntax_4658.title: Shutdown Message
syntax_4658.description: Gets the shutdown message, message sent when the server stops, of the server.

syntax_4663.creator: BluBoy3ch0
syntax_4663.title: Water Ambient Spawn Ticks
syntax_4663.description: Gets the water ambient spawn rate, in ticks, of the server.

en: Gets the water ambient spawn rate, in ticks, of the server.

syntax_4665.creator: BluBoy3ch0
syntax_4665.title: Water Ambient Spawn Limit
syntax_4665.description: Gets the limit of water ambient spawns.

en: Gets the limit of water ambient spawns.

syntax_4849.creator: BluBoy3ch0
syntax_4849.title: Wolf Collar Color
syntax_4849.description: Gets or sets the collar color of an entity, if that entity is a wolf

en: Gets or sets the collar color of an entity, if that entity is a wolf

syntax_4850.creator: BluBoy3ch0
syntax_4850.title: Fox Crouch State
syntax_4850.description:
Gets the state of an entity's crouching, if that entity is a wolf.
Can be set, but note that the entity will override it setting it back to standing.

en:
Gets the state of an entity's crouching, if that entity is a wolf.
Can be set, but note that the entity will override it setting it back to standing.

syntax_4851.creator: BluBoy3ch0
syntax_4851.title: Sleep State
syntax_4851.description:
Gets the sleep state of an entity
Can be set if the entity is a fox, but note that the entity will override this causing it to go back to standing.

en:
Gets the sleep state of an entity
Can be set if the entity is a fox, but note that the entity will override this causing it to go back to standing.

syntax_4852.creator: BluBoy3ch0
syntax_4852.title: Restock Amount
syntax_4852.description: Gets the amount of times a villager has restocked during that day

en: Gets the amount of times a villager has restocked during that day

syntax_4853.creator: BluBoy3ch0
syntax_4853.title: Player Leash
syntax_4853.description:
Called just prior to when a player leashes an entity
`event-player` is the player who leashed
`event-entity` is the entity being leashed

en:
Called just prior to when a player leashes an entity
`event-player` is the player who leashed
`event-entity` is the entity being leashed

syntax_4854.creator: BluBoy3ch0
syntax_4854.title: Whitelist Toggle
syntax_4854.description:
Called when the whitelist is toggled on or off
[ `/whitelist on` or `/whitelist off` ]
`event-boolean` is the value of if the whitelist is now on or off

en:
Called when the whitelist is toggled on or off
[ `/whitelist on` or `/whitelist off` ]
`event-boolean` is the value of if the whitelist is now on or off

syntax_4855.creator: BluBoy3ch0
syntax_4855.title: Villager Sleep
syntax_4855.description: Attempts  to make a villager sleep at a certain location. The location has to be a bed or else nothing will happen.

en: Attempts  to make a villager sleep at a certain location. The location has to be a bed or else nothing will happen.

syntax_4856.creator: BluBoy3ch0
syntax_4856.title: Open Lid
syntax_4856.description: Plays the open animation for the container block [chest, barrel, shulker box] without there being a player to receive the inventory. The chest will stay in the open position until it is closed using the `Close Lid` effect.

en: Plays the open animation for the container block [chest, barrel, shulker box] without there being a player to receive the inventory. The chest will stay in the open position until it is closed using the `Close Lid` effect.

syntax_4857.creator: BluBoy3ch0
syntax_4857.title: Close Lid
syntax_4857.description: Plays the closing animation for a container block [chest, barrel, shulker box] without there being a player to receive the inventory.

en: Plays the closing animation for a container block [chest, barrel, shulker box] without there being a player to receive the inventory.

syntax_4858.creator: BluBoy3ch0
syntax_4858.title: Allow
syntax_4858.description: Allows a connection from the `on connect` event, this means that the player attempting to join will be able to join the server. This will mean that they can bypass the whitelist and any other connections that end with them being disconnected.

en: Allows a connection from the `on connect` event, this means that the player attempting to join will be able to join the server. This will mean that they can bypass the whitelist and any other connections that end with them being disconnected.

syntax_4859.creator: BluBoy3ch0
syntax_4859.title: Disallow
syntax_4859.description: This is the opposite of the `Allow` effect. This will kick the player attempting to join, and give them a message.

en: This is the opposite of the `Allow` effect. This will kick the player attempting to join, and give them a message.

syntax_4860.creator: BluBoy3ch0
syntax_4860.title: Is Sleeping
syntax_4860.description: Checks if an entity is sleeping, this applies to all living entities, although not all entities can sleep.

en: Checks if an entity is sleeping, this applies to all living entities, although not all entities can sleep.

syntax_4861.creator: BluBoy3ch0
syntax_4861.title: Fox Is Crouching
syntax_4861.description: Checks if a fox is in the crouching position, as in they are sitting down.

en: Checks if a fox is in the crouching position, as in they are sitting down.
